thesis: A four-mine North American silver platform combining 66% silver revenue exposure, record cash generation, district-scale exploration and a funded path toward renewed gold production at Jerritt Canyon.

source.title: First Majestic Silver Corporate Presentation - May 2026

whyItMatters.label: Silver leverage
whyItMatters.detail: Share of year-to-date 2026 revenue from silver; 94% of revenue is from precious metals.

whyItMatters.label: Production platform
whyItMatters.detail: Four producing underground mines in Mexico, including a 70% interest in Los Gatos.

whyItMatters.label: Silver reserves
whyItMatters.detail: Attributable proven-and-probable silver reserves effective December 31, 2025.

whyItMatters.label: Jurisdiction footprint
whyItMatters.detail: Mining claims across Mexico and Nevada, concentrated in established mining districts.

whyItMatters.label: Growth runway
whyItMatters.detail: Approximately 266,000 metres of exploration planned across the portfolio in 2026.

assets.name: Los Gatos
assets.description: A 70%-owned, low-cost underground silver mine with 103,000 hectares and 61,000 metres of 2026 exploration planned.

assets.name: San Dimas
assets.production: 4.0-4.4 Moz silver and 49-55 koz gold guidance
assets.description: A 72,000-hectare underground district with 117,000 metres of 2026 drilling and the new Coronado vein.

assets.name: Santa Elena
assets.production: 1.3-1.5 Moz silver and 64-71 koz gold guidance
assets.description: A 102,000-hectare operation with Navidad and Santo Nino discoveries and 78,000 metres of planned drilling.

assets.name: La Encantada
assets.description: A pure-silver producer where improved ore flow lifted 2025 production 32% year over year.

assets.name: Jerritt Canyon
assets.description: A Nevada gold project with a $75M restart plan and one of only three roasters in the state.

production.label: 2026 silver guidance
production.detail: Consolidated silver production guidance across Los Gatos, Santa Elena, San Dimas and La Encantada.

production.label: 2026 gold guidance
production.detail: Consolidated gold production guidance, primarily from Santa Elena and San Dimas.

production.label: Q1 silver production
production.detail: Equal to 26% of the midpoint of 2026 silver guidance.

production.label: P&P silver reserves
production.detail: Attributable proven-and-probable silver reserves as of December 31, 2025.

scenarios.name: Bull case
scenarios.headline: Silver leverage combines with record cash generation and portfolio expansion.
points: Historical equity beta of approximately 2-3x to silver remains intact.
Los Gatos and Santa Elena expansion projects lift production and margins.
Approximately 266,000 metres of drilling converts district-scale exploration into reserves.
Jerritt Canyon returns to production in H2 2027 without weakening liquidity.

scenarios.name: Base case
scenarios.headline: 2026 guidance is delivered while free cash flow funds exploration and growth.
points: Silver production lands within the 13.0-14.4 Moz guidance range.
Consolidated AISC remains within $26.15-$27.91 per AgEq ounce.
The $213-$236M capital program is funded from operating cash flow and liquidity.
The balance sheet supports exploration, dividends and measured expansion.

scenarios.name: Bear case
scenarios.headline: Operating leverage reverses if metal prices weaken or costs exceed guidance.
points: Silver and gold prices retreat from the assumptions embedded in 2026 guidance.
AISC exceeds guidance at higher-cost operations such as La Encantada.
Mexico tax proceedings create a larger or longer-lived financial overhang.
Jerritt Canyon restart capital or timing moves beyond the announced plan.

financials.label: Market cap
financials.detail: Company-disclosed market capitalization at the May 11, 2026 market close.

financials.label: Treasury
financials.detail: $985M cash plus $144M of restricted cash at March 31, 2026.

financials.label: Q1 EBITDA
financials.detail: Up 192% year over year, representing a 64% EBITDA margin on revenue.

financials.label: Q1 free cash flow
financials.detail: Operating cash flow less sustaining capital expenditure.

financials.label: Net cash
financials.detail: Calculated from $985M cash less $405M disclosed convertible debentures; excludes restricted cash and other adjustments.

rickRule.label: Survival score
rickRule.detail: $983M available liquidity and record Q1 cash generation materially strengthen cycle resilience.

rickRule.label: Asset quality
rickRule.detail: Four producing underground mines plus large district land packages and Nevada restart optionality.

rickRule.label: Jurisdiction
rickRule.detail: Established Mexico and Nevada districts offset by the active Mexico tax dispute.

rickRule.label: Valuation
rickRule.detail: Calculated research score using the disclosed $12B market capitalization and Q1 cash-generation profile.

ericSprott.label: Torque score
ericSprott.detail: Approximately 2-3x historical beta to silver and 66% silver revenue exposure.

ericSprott.label: Silver leverage
ericSprott.detail: 66% silver revenue exposure and 94% total precious-metals revenue exposure.

ericSprott.label: Growth score
ericSprott.detail: Los Gatos, Santa Elena throughput, 266 km of exploration and Jerritt Canyon create multiple growth vectors.

ericSprott.label: Catalyst score
ericSprott.detail: Portfolio expansion, reserve growth, discoveries and a targeted H2 2027 Jerritt restart.

timeline.title: Operating platform begins
timeline.description: The company highlights 22 years of proven operations and growth in its May 2026 presentation.

timeline.title: San Dimas joins the portfolio
timeline.description: San Dimas becomes a cornerstone silver-gold operation with a 72,000-hectare district position.

timeline.title: Jerritt Canyon acquired
timeline.description: Nevada gold exposure adds a large resource base and strategic refractory processing infrastructure.

timeline.title: Los Gatos expands the platform
timeline.description: The 70%-owned Los Gatos mine adds low-cost silver production and a 103,000-hectare district.

timeline.title: Record cash generation
timeline.description: Revenue reached $477M, EBITDA $307M, operating cash flow $311M and free cash flow $224M.

timeline.title: Jerritt Canyon restart target
timeline.description: The company announced a $75M restart plan targeting renewed gold production in the second half of 2027.

risks.name: Political
risks.mitigation: The company is pursuing domestic challenges and two separate NAFTA arbitration proceedings concerning Mexico tax matters.

risks.name: Operational
risks.mitigation: Four producing mines diversify operations, while 2026 guidance and mine-level cost ranges provide measurable execution benchmarks.

risks.name: Commodity price
risks.mitigation: Strong liquidity and precious-metals diversification provide a cushion, but high silver beta remains central to the thesis.

risks.name: Balance sheet
risks.mitigation: $983M of available liquidity and record cash flow support the capital program and announced restart plan.
